levels.title: Lava Survival
levels.subtitle: Keep moving
levels.feature: Touched tiles blink red, then fall away.
rules: Touch each new tile for another 100 points.
Move before a blinking tile falls.
The run ends after the ball remains in a pit for 2 seconds.

levels.title: Hex-A-Fall
levels.subtitle: Claim the floor before it disappears
levels.feature: Random tiles blink red, then fall away.
rules: Touch each floor tile once for a point.
Move away from blinking red tiles.
The run ends after the ball remains in a pit for 2 seconds.

levels.title: Snake
levels.subtitle: Chase the flashing food
levels.feature: Each food pickup raises a wall and drops a floor tile.
rules: Reach flashing blue food for 100 points.
Each pickup adds one wall and one pit.
The run ends after the ball remains in a pit for 2 seconds.

levels.title: Food Frenzy
levels.subtitle: Clear an ever-growing feast
levels.feature: Each round adds another flashing food tile.
rules: Collect flashing blue food against the yellow floor.
Clearing every food completes one level for 500 points.
Clear as many levels as possible before time expires.

levels.title: Maze
levels.subtitle: Race through the shifting maze
levels.feature: Green bridge tiles move on a timer. Cross while they are flush or wait for the next beat.
rules: Follow the orange path from cyan to magenta.
Green tiles are raised walls; the three gates change every 2.5 seconds.
Reach magenta as quickly as possible.
The run ends after the ball remains in a red lowered pit for 2 seconds.
levels.kenLine: Timing puzzle! Green gates cycle every few seconds — roll on the orange beat.
levels.trollLine: Dance, little prisoner! The floor moves when I say so.
